utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six categories. Checking each: 1) property — fully specified with type, location, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, condition, move_in_date. 2) financing — includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, term, fees, and monthly payment. 3) legal_services — includes package, cost breakdowns, and total. 4) moving_services — includes service level, cost, and inclusions. 5) setup_services — includes utility package, cost, timeline, optional service, and total. 6) total_budget — includes property price, down payment, fees, legal, moving, setup, optional, totals, and currency. All are complete and detailed per the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution shows a purchase of a 'Detached House' in West End, Oakville for CAD $890,000 with a mortgage, legal, moving, and setup services. To map this to the ground-truth ratings, I identify the corresponding items: (1) The property type matches a purchased home, so it corresponds to one of the 'purchase_properties'. The price and description best align with the 'Family House' (within budget, family-oriented, 4 bedrooms, 2.5+ bathrooms). (2) The financing method is 'Mortgage', which matches 'Traditional Mortgage' in purchase_financing. (3) The legal package is 'Basic Legal Package' under essential_legal_services. (4) The survey cost matches 'Full Structural Survey' due to its CAD $650 price. (5) The moving service 'Standard Family Relocation' corresponds to 'Standard Moving' under moving_services. (6) The utility setup 'Premium Utility Setup' matches 'Premium Utilities' under utility_setup. These are the included items, and their ratings can be directly taken from the ground-truth ratings.
